MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling -
PLAINTIFF MARGARET MOORE'S DEMURRER TO DEFENDANTS EDWARD GEETER AND CECILIA GEETER'S ANSWER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT IS Overruled in its entirety. The demurrer served no useful purpose.
